auth.registerLead: Get started with your email address and password.

home.title: Start creating your video
home.lead: Edit image-led scenes and captions that advance like a visual novel.

settings.title: Default settings
settings.defaultFpsHint: This does not affect existing projects. Change those from Project settings in the editor.

apiTokens.title: External API tokens
apiTokens.description: Issue a token for Codex or NovelCreator to control Douga.
apiTokens.name: Token name
apiTokens.expiresHint: If omitted, the token remains valid until manually revoked.
apiTokens.issuedWarning: This value is shown only once. Store it somewhere secure.
apiTokens.empty: No API tokens have been issued.

password.title: Change password
password.description: Confirm your current password and choose a new one.
password.mismatch: The new passwords do not match.

projects.title: Projects
projects.lead: Open your work from a visual library and continue editing instantly.
projects.empty: No projects yet. Name your first video to get started.

settings.title: Project settings
settings.fpsHint: Changes are autosaved and used for future previews and exports.

exportDialog.title: MP4 export settings
exportDialog.overrideHint: Changes here only apply to this export and do not change project settings.
exportDialog.browserHint: The experimental exporter draws the same preview with WebGL and creates an MP4 on this device using WebCodecs. Keep this page open while it runs.

exports.title: Completed videos
exports.lead: Manage MP4 files rendered from fixed project revisions.

editor.imageDropHere: Drop an image here to add it to the canvas
editor.audioDropHere: Drop an MP3 to add an audio track
editor.deleteTimelineRangeInstruction: Drag across the time ruler to select a range
editor.insertTimelineRangeInstruction: Select an insertion point on the time ruler
editor.downloadImageFailed: The image could not be downloaded.
editor.durationAutoHint: Automatically extends to fit the end of objects, keyframes, captions, and audio.

speech.title: Create AI speech
speech.lead: Generate narration from text and add it at the current playhead.
speech.placeholder: For example: Today, we explore a mysterious story hidden in the city at night.
speech.noVoices: No voices are available. Add a voice model in AivisSpeech.

assets.title: Assets
assets.lead: Upload images, video, and audio to reuse across your videos.
assets.generatePlaceholder: Example: a beach at sunset, visual-novel style, no people
assets.empty: No assets yet. Try adding your first image.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.name: AI
assistant.welcomeTitle: What would you like to create?
assistant.welcomeLead: We can work together on the plot, script, and visual direction.
assistant.placeholder: Describe the video or ask for ideas…

errors.assistantThreadNotFound: The AI conversation could not be found.
errors.assistantUnavailable: The AI assistant is unavailable. Please try again.
errors.assistantStreamDisconnected: The connection to the AI assistant was lost. Reload the conversation.
errors.assistantRunNotFound: The AI run could not be found.
errors.assistantRunNotCancellable: This AI run cannot be stopped.
errors.creativeDocumentNotFound: The creative document could not be found.
errors.creativeDocumentInvalid: The creative document has an invalid structure.
errors.assistantToolNotFound: The requested AI tool is unavailable.
errors.assistantToolArgumentsInvalid: The AI tool arguments were invalid.
errors.assistantToolLimitExceeded: The AI used too many tools in one run.
errors.assistantToolCorrectionExceeded: The run stopped after repeated invalid tool arguments.
errors.assistantProjectConflict: The project changed during the AI edit. Reload the latest version.
errors.assistantRunHasNoChanges: This AI run has no changes to undo.
errors.assistantRunAlreadyUndone: The changes from this AI run were already undone.
errors.assistantUndoConflict: There are newer edits after the AI change, so it was not undone.
errors.projectCanvasNotFound: The editing canvas could not be found.
errors.layerNotFound: The target object could not be found.
errors.layerLocked: A locked object cannot be changed.
errors.assistantToolCallNotFound: The AI tool approval request could not be found.
errors.assistantToolCallNotWaiting: This approval request was already handled.
errors.assistantRunActive: Another run is active in this conversation. Complete, approve, or stop it before retrying.
errors.assistantRunQuotaExceeded: You have reached the hourly AI assistant run limit.
errors.assistantTokenLimitExceeded: This AI run reached its token limit.
errors.assistantTokenQuotaExceeded: You have reached the hourly AI assistant token limit.
errors.imageQuotaExceeded: You have reached the hourly image generation limit.
errors.imageGenerationNotFound: Image generation history was not found.
errors.imageGenerationNotCancellable: This image generation cannot be cancelled.
errors.browserExportFailed: Video export on this device failed. Try the server exporter instead.
errors.browserExportUnsupported: This browser does not support WebGL and WebCodecs export.
errors.exportNotFound: The exported video was not found.
errors.exportQuotaExceeded: You have reached the hourly video export limit.
errors.previewRangeInvalid: The preview time range is invalid.
errors.previewRangeTooLong: A preview must be 15 seconds or shorter.
errors.frameTimeOutOfRange: The requested time is outside the video.
errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email address is already registered.
errors.invalidCredentials: The email address or password is incorrect.
errors.csrfInvalid: This page has expired. Please reload it.
errors.originNotAllowed: Requests from this origin are not allowed.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.projectConflict: This project was updated elsewhere. Please reload.
errors.uploadInvalid: The file format could not be validated.
errors.assistantAttachmentLimit: You can attach up to four images at a time.
errors.imageUploadOnly: Drop a PNG, JPEG, or WebP image.
errors.uploadTooLarge: The file exceeds the upload size limit.
errors.assetNotReady: The asset upload or processing has not completed.
errors.apiTokenScopeInvalid: The API token scopes are invalid.
errors.apiTokenExpiryInvalid: The API token expiry is invalid.
errors.apiTokenNotFound: The API token was not found.
errors.apiTokenInvalid: The API token is invalid or expired.
errors.apiTokenScopeRequired: The API token lacks the required scope.
errors.authAmbiguous: Cookie authentication and an API token cannot be used together.
errors.idempotencyKeyRequired: This API operation requires an Idempotency-Key.
errors.idempotencyConflict: The Idempotency-Key was reused with different content.
errors.idempotencyInProgress: The same API operation is currently running.
errors.operationNotFound: The external API operation was not found.
errors.projectSchemaUnsupported: This project data version is not supported.
errors.clipRangeInvalid: The clip start and end times are invalid.
errors.clipOutOfRange: The clip extends beyond the video duration.
errors.keyframeOutOfRange: The keyframe is outside the clip time range.
errors.audioFadeTooLong: The audio fades exceed the clip duration.
errors.previewNotFound: The preview video was not found.
errors.requestTooLarge: The request data exceeds the size limit.
errors.aivisUnavailable: Could not connect to AivisSpeech Engine. Check that AivisSpeech is installed.
errors.speechGenerationFailed: Speech could not be generated. Check the voice and text, then try again.
errors.speechTextInvalid: Enter between 1 and 500 characters to synthesize.

warnings.trackClipOverlap: Clips overlap on the same track.
warnings.timelineGap: There is a time range with no visual clip.
